title: Notification No.61/2008-Cus(NT), dated 29.05.2008
text: Notification No. 61 / 2008-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 29th May, 2008 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs(Export), JNCH, Nhava Sheva, to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Commissioner of Customs, (General and CFS Mulund); and (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Meenu Exim Pvt. Ltd., Block No. 160, Plot No. 18B to 18C, At/Po.-Pipodara, Ta-Mangrol, Dis-Surat issued, vide F.No. DRI/AZU/INV-06/2005/Meenu, dated the 16th June, 2006, F.No. DRI/AZU/INV-06/2005/Meenu, dated the 27th July, 2007, and F.No. DRI/AZU/INV- 06/2005/ Meenu, dated the 7th February, 2006 by the Additional Director General, Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/50/2007-Cus.IV] (Aseem Kumar) Under Secretary to the government of India -- 1 of 1 --
